3113810.name: Blitz and Pieces
3113810.description:
Blitz and Pieces is a retro FPS game with a focus on fast paced movement and interesting weapon combos.

Mankind has been eradicated by a flesh eating pathogen. But luckily for you, you're not made of flesh.

The game features:
- Many unique weapons that interact with each other in explosive ways
- A variety of enemy types
- Plenty of emergent movement tech
- 5 unique worlds, consisting of 5 levels each
- Lots of collectables and secret areas in every level

You can choose your own play-style and kill enemies in whatever way you see fit.
3113810.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
